compliance.assurance_rationale: UK Cyber Essentials Montpellier CE.BF.1 Boundary firewalls — NAC policy change auditing covers boundary-enforcement policy change tracking for the 2025 Montpellier update.
IEC 62443 FR 6.2 Continuous monitoring — NAC policy change audit complements continuous monitoring of IACS network posture.
FedRAMP Rev.5 Baselines AC-2 Account management — NAC policy changes are adjacent to AC-2 when device accounts gate access.
